THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, MIGUEL MARTINEZ, GUADALUPE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 589 CASTRO ST, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94114, STAYED UNTIL JAN-31-1994, STAYED UNTIL JANUARY 31, 1994 AT 12 O'CLOCK,NOON. DEFTS SHALL NOT BE LIABLE TO PLTFS FOR THE RENT OF,OCTOBER,NOVEMB, DECEMBER 1993 AND JANUARY, 1994. SEE CASE FILE FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
